NAVAREA XIX 79/17

NORWEGIAN SEASEISMIC SURVEY 27 JULY TO 31 AUGUST
WG AMUNDSEN TOWING 12 X 6000 METRE LONG CABLES WITHIN AREA BOUND BY

A.65-12.80N 003-17.30E
B.66-37.80N 003-17.30E
C.66-34.20N 008-32.60E
D.65-12.10N 008-34.90E

REQUESTING 6 MILE BERTH ASTERN AND 3 MILE BERTH AHEAD AND ABEAM.
